allies.rationale_text: Empathy strengthens multicultural-team-dynamics by helping the team model how the same event looks from different cultural standpoints.
allies.source_quote: The Empathize phase of Design Thinking requires viewing the problem from the perspective of the users and assessing the interests of multiple actors.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking strengthens multicultural-team-dynamics by showing how local team interactions shape broader downstream effects.
allies.source_quote: The goal of MCTD is congruent with Systems Thinking, striving to gain a full picture of the system to make better decisions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with status-quo-bias when social comfort suppresses the unfamiliar perspectives that would improve the decision.
structured_tensions.source_quote: multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when pressure for social comfort suppresses dissenting perspectives.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with authority-bias when hierarchy overrides lower-power cross-cultural signal.
structured_tensions.source_quote: multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when hierarchy overrides cross-cultural signal from lower-power members.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams interpret unfamiliar behavior through their own cultural defaults instead of investigating alternatives.
structured_tensions.source_quote: multicultural-team-dynamics conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when teams interpret cross-cultural behaviors through the lens of their own cultural assumptions rather than genuinely investigating alternative explanations.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
